description: Democrats’ hopes of taking Texas ride on the state’s nearly 3 million Black voters, many of whom supported Jasmine Crockett in the primary.

title: American Culture Quiz: Test yourself on baseball bests and restaurant revamps
description: The American Culture Quiz is a weekly test of our national traits, trends, history and people. This time, test your knowledge of baseball bests, restaurant revamps and more.

title: Trump’s DC beautification push wins rare Dem praise as president snaps landmarks back to life
description: President Trump's D.C. restoration projects win rare Democratic praise as neglected fountains and landmarks come back to life across the capital.

title: White House Correspondents' Dinner shooting sharpens focus on Trump’s ballroom construction proposal
description: A shooting outside the White House Correspondents' Dinner renews focus on President Trump's push for a secure White House ballroom with bulletproof materials.

title: Top lobbying firm does bidding of entity linked to Uyghur repression
description: Akin Gump, the fourth largest lobbying firm in the country by revenue, is being paid to advocate for a polysilicon manufacturer led by an individual whom the U.S. government has linked to China’s repression of the Uyghur people. In September 2025, Akin Gump entered into a lobbying contract with United Solar Polysilicon to represent its […]

title: Heavy Snow Warning, up to 12 Inches To Hit—‘Dangerous Conditions’
description: Heavy snow hits the Mountain West as the NWS warns of dangerous travel, with up to 12 inches in Colorado and Wyoming.

title: Mali’s Defence Minister Sadio Camara killed amid coordinated attacks
description: Camara's house in the garrison town of Kati came under attack amid simultaneous attacks across the West African country.

title: What we know about the suspected ‘assassination attempt’ on Donald Trump
description: A man armed is in custody after trying to rush the White House Correspondents' Dinner, which Trump was attending.

title: Mass shooting near Indiana U. campus wounds 9 on Kirkwood Ave. after ‘Little 500’
description: Gunfire erupted as crowds of revelers were celebrating the famed "Little 500" college cycling race on the popular strip of Kirkwood Avenue in Bloomington just after midnight.

title: Sabastian Sawe smashes two-hour barrier to make history at London Marathon
description: Sabastian Sawe makes history at the London Marathon as the first person to run a sub-two-hour marathon in a competitive race.

title: Kenya's Sabastian Sawe is first person to run sub-2-hour marathon to win in London
description: In a huge moment in sports history, Sabastian Sawe smashed the men's world record by 65 seconds in winning the London Marathon in 1 hour, 59 minutes and 30 seconds on Sunday.

title: UK says cooperating closely with US on security ahead of King Charles' visit - Reuters
description: UK says cooperating closely with US on security ahead of King Charles' visit  Reuters

title: Titan submersible widow says remains of husband and son came back in what looked like small 'shoeboxes'
description: Christine Dawood says remains of her husband and son came back in two small boxes nine months after the catastrophic Titan submersible implosion.

title: Helena Bonham Carter Exits ‘The White Lotus’ Season 4 as HBO Reworks Key Role Mid-Production
description: A rare shake-up hits Mike White’s meticulously cast hit.
